approval.note: Use an isolated Commonworld worktree. Before every nontrivial merge require complete published diff, head/tree/diff-bound self-review, green CI, review resolution and exact live Pages readback.

metadata.direct_execution_authority: operator instruction: weiter an commonworld arbeiten

title: Implement intent-oriented search and discovery
goal: Let people search by German concepts, actions and places and reach the matching spatial or digital context.

acceptance.assertion: German labels, synonyms, actions, places and regions participate in search.
Globe exposes result count, empty state and keyboard-navigable results.
Selecting a geographic result moves to its public representation while digital results remain coordinate-free.
Published actions such as use, learn, contribute or donate have sourced direct destinations when claimed.
Presence, action, language, access, freshness and curation filters preserve identity semantics.
